notes: Bundled mlx-vlm upgraded 0.4.0→0.4.4 so Gemma 4 (and 9 newer VLM families) ship natively instead of via a fragile cherry-pick. Fixes ModuleNotFoundError on fresh installs. New pre-build guardrail fails the release if any critical bundled module is missing. Also rolls up all v1.3.49/50 fixes.
